eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Midway Islands, US Pacific Islands; at 3:22 PM on MAY 26, 2026 Effective until 4:22 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: The IPAWS TSS is performing a TEST of the Emergency Alert System. No action is required. This is only a TEST.
